{"findings": [{"file_path": "CLAUDE.md", "line_number": 65, "severity": "medium", "issue": "The AC contract testing requirement (lines 65\u201376) mandates that every output schema field be tested, but does not define how to handle optional/nullable fields or fields that are conditionally present. (2) For optional fields, assert they are either present (even if None) or explicitly documented as omitted. (3) For conditional fields, assert the condition is tested (e.g., if agent_name is only set when agent_type='named', test both cases). Add an example: 'Test both agent_name=None and agent_name=\"leo\" to ensure the field is always present in the schema.'", "confidence": 0.75, "category": "architecture", "agent_name": "leo"}]}
